r1_close.pm_status_summary: WK136 CLOSED (pending final qa_smoke). Root cause 1 (the hang): _poll_conversation_response only ran inside the sim-tick body; chat is allowed while PAUSED (and pause is exactly when players chat), so responses queued forever. Fix: poll once per RENDER frame in lifecycle.tick_simulation (both frontends drive it every frame regardless of pause). Root cause 2 (gpt-5-nano): 600 max_completion_tokens with no reasoning_effort -> reasoning ate the budget -> empty content -> canned fallback every time; plus 5-8s timeouts too tight. Fix: gpt-5* ladder (2000 tokens + reasoning_effort minimal->low->none), no temperature, CONVERSATION_TIMEOUT=30s (autonomous stays 5s), '<Hero> is thinking...' pending indicator. .env OPENAI_MODEL -> gpt-5-nano. Pre-fix test failures proved both bugs; real-key E2E through a PAUSED engine: 2.4-2.5s, real in-character responses delivered to ChatPanel.
